title: polymorphic_embed library for flexible type dispatch
prompt: A Notification can carry one of: EmailPayload, SmsPayload, or PushPayload — different embedded_schemas with different fields. Instead of separate associations or :imageable_type columns, use the polymorphic_embed library. In the Notification schema, declare `polymorphic_embeds_one :payload, types: [email: EmailPayload, sms: SmsPayload, push: PushPayload]`. Write the notification and its three payload embedded schemas to lib/my_app/notifications/notification.ex.
tier_rationale: Requires knowing the polymorphic_embed library exists and its API. Sonnet often falls back to Rails-style type columns.
research_citation: polymorphic_embed library README: 'brings support for polymorphic/dynamic embedded schemas in Ecto.'
